headlines.title: Trump heads to high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: President Trump has left for Beijing and a high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas is there.

headlines.title: Inside China’s battle for electric vehicle dominance
headlines.description: Tom Llamas takes a Chinese electric vehicle for a test drive to see why brands like BYD are dominating the global market and why a 100% U.S. tariff is part of what’s keeping them out of American driveways.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the United States, it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: Pentagon considering renaming Iran war ‘Sledgehammer’ if ceasefire collapses
headlines.description: The U.S. military is considering officially re-naming the war with Iran to “Operation Sledgehammer” if the current ceasefire collapses

headlines.title: Trump says he’s not thinking about Americans’ finances ‘even a little bit’ in Iran talks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he is not weighing the economic burden of the Iran war on everyday Americans when negotiating a deal with the country’s leadership

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.

headlines.title: Alabama jail staff didn’t help when she went into labor — other inmates did, lawsuit says
headlines.description: In a state with a long history of arresting pregnant women, one mom in custody says she was left to fend for herself.

headlines.title: Dems warn a third of Congressional Black Caucus could be wiped out by redistricting wars
headlines.description: The Congressional Black Caucus is expected to dramatically lose membership because of the Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.

headlines.title: King Charles III enters stage of Britain’s political drama as PM Starmer faces down challengers
headlines.description: LONDON — Plotters are trying to bring down the British prime minister.

headlines.title: Inside look at quarantine facility for cruise ship passengers
headlines.description: One of the passengers from the cruise ship hit with a deadly outbreak of Hantavirus posted a video showing what the accommodations are like at the special medical facility in Omaha where passengers are being monitored. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Hackers agree to delete stolen data from Canvas
headlines.description: Hackers agree to delete stolen data from Canvas
